title: Debate Welcome — Andrej Karpathy on what Cursor can automate and what still needs you
author: Chris Dunlop
text:
Member-only story
Debate Welcome — Andrej Karpathy on what Cursor can automate and what still needs you
Whenever Andrej Karpathy posts, I feel like Sherlock Holmes. I read his tweets, I nod politely. I sort of understand. But the real meaning only unlocks years later for me. (When I first installed Cursor in March this year, was the first big unlock)
I’m convinced he’s from the future. Back in 2023 he wrote this.
Not a Medium member? Keep Reading for free by clicking here.
Here’s another fun one.
Oh and remember he created an army of vibe coders.
The latest tweet is extremely interesting
Firstly the tweet is here
I’d suggest you go and read the whole thing.
Here’s how I’d summarise Karpathy’s point, in plain English, through my own lens.
What he’s basically saying is this: in the old world of software, things got automated if you could write down the instructions. That’s why bookkeeping, databases, payroll…
